clause_text_summary: Contractor shall indemnify Owner against all claims, losses, and damages without any cap on liability
thermax_position: Thermax accepts indemnity capped at 100% of contract value; reject unlimited
notes: Standard Thermax position: indemnity capped at contract value

clause_text_summary: LD at 1% of contract value per week of delay, maximum 15% of contract value
thermax_position: Thermax standard: 0.5%/week max 10%; counter at 0.75%/week max 10%
notes: 15% cap is above Thermax threshold; negotiate down

clause_text_summary: For every 0.1 MW shortfall below 3.0 MW guaranteed output, penalty of 0.5% of contract value
thermax_position: Acceptable if tolerance band of ±2% is included and test conditions defined
notes: Within reasonable range; ensure test method specified

clause_text_summary: All designs, drawings, and IP developed during project shall become property of Owner
thermax_position: Thermax retains background IP; only project-specific deliverables assigned to customer
notes: Protect Thermax proprietary boiler designs and control software

clause_text_summary: Warranty period of 36 months from commissioning or 42 months from delivery, whichever is earlier
thermax_position: Thermax standard: 18 months from commissioning or 24 from delivery; counter at 24/30
notes: Extended warranty increases cost; price adjustment required

clause_text_summary: No advance payment; first payment at 30% upon delivery of major equipment to site
thermax_position: Thermax requires minimum 10% advance with PO; 20% preferred for EPC projects
notes: Cash flow impact significant; negotiate 10% advance

clause_text_summary: Force majeure limited to natural disasters only; excludes government actions, epidemics, supply chain disruptions
thermax_position: Thermax requires broader FM including government orders and epidemic/pandemic events
notes: COVID-era learning: must include epidemic and supply chain events

clause_text_summary: Contractor shall ensure all installations comply with WHO-PQ and cGMP requirements at contractor's cost
thermax_position: Acceptable — Thermax pharma division has established cGMP compliance procedures
notes: Standard pharma requirement; included in pricing

clause_text_summary: 10% advance, 60% pro-rata on dispatch, 20% on erection completion, 10% on commissioning acceptance
thermax_position: Acceptable — NTPC standard terms; aligned with Thermax requirements
notes: Government standard terms; no negotiation expected

clause_text_summary: Owner may terminate contract at any time for convenience with 30 days notice; payment for work done + 5% termination fee
thermax_position: Thermax prefers 60 days notice and 10% termination fee to cover demobilisation costs
notes: Government contracts often have this clause; negotiate termination fee
